summary:
Histologically, ameloblastomas resemble each other irrespective of malignancy status; none closely match basal cell carcinoma more than others do for this specific comparison.
The answer choice reflecting closest resemblance based given data appears to be A.
``` ```plaintext
Ameloblastomas show consistent histologic features across different subtypes but most closely resemble each other rather than any of the specified alternative tumors.
Thus,
\boxed{A}
```
